refnamediv.refpurpose: Generates a new quasirandom Sobol vector.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Calling Sequence
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [ quasi , lastq , count ] = lowdisc_sobolnext ( count , maxcol , dim_num , lastq , v , recipd )

listitem.para: a 1 x 1 matrix of floating point integers. On input : the index of the element to compute. On output, the updated value of the index of the element.
a 1 x 1 matrix of floating point integers,number of bits in atmost
a 1 x 1 matrix of floating point integers, the current number of dimensions. We expect to have 1<= dim_num<= 40, since no more that 40 polynomials are stored in the database.
a dim_num x 1 matrix of floating point integers, the numerators of the last vector generated
a dimmax x logmax matrix of floating point integers, table of direction numbers. Each row corresponds to a primitive polynomial. The numbers in v are actually binary fractions.
a 1 x 1 matrix of doubles, (1/denominator) for the numerators lastq
a dim_num x 1 matrix of doubles, the next quasirandom vector.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The routine adapts the ideas of Antonov and Saleev, that is, uses a Gray code for the update of the numerators lastq.
Thanks to Francis Dalaudier for pointing out that the range of allowed values of DIM_NUM should start at 1, not 2! 17 February 2009.

refsection.title: Examples
Bibliography
refsection.para: Antonov, Saleev, USSR Computational Mathematics and Mathematical Physics, Volume 19, 1980, pages 252 - 256.
Paul Bratley, Bennett Fox, Algorithm 659: Implementing Sobol's Quasirandom Sequence Generator, ACM Transactions on Mathematical Software, Volume 14, Number 1, pages 88-100, 1988.
Bennett Fox, Algorithm 647: Implementation and Relative Efficiency of Quasirandom Sequence Generators, ACM Transactions on Mathematical Software, Volume 12, Number 4, pages 362-376, 1986.
Ilya Sobol, USSR Computational Mathematics and Mathematical Physics, Volume 16, pages 236-242, 1977.
Ilya Sobol, Levitan, The Production of Points Uniformly Distributed in a Multidimensional Cube (in Russian), Preprint IPM Akad. Nauk SSSR, Number 40, Moscow 1976.
